description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, modern fuselage with a matte black exterior and subtle green highlights along the body and tail. The main rotor consists of four long, slender blades with a dark finish and a central hub colored in orange-brown. The cockpit is equipped with multiple angular windows, providing wide visibility for pilots, and the side doors and undercarriage are visible, suggesting access points and landing gear. The tail section is elongated, ending in a vertical stabilizer and a small tail rotor with protective features. The helicopter's undercarriage appears to use wheels rather than traditional skids, and various antennas and sensors are mounted on the body. The overall design suggests a utility or military-style helicopter suitable for urban operations.
description: A matte black, modern helicopter with four main rotor blades, angular cockpit windows, and a wheeled undercarriage, accented by green highlights and an orange-brown rotor hub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four main rotor blades, angular cockpit windows, and the nose profile.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit window arrangement, landing gear, and tail rotor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, vertical stabilizer, and the tail rotor configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with visible cockpit windows, landing gear, and tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, slender main rotor blades, dark in color with a matte finish, attached to an orange-brown central hub. The blades appear to be made of composite material and are unmarked.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small tail rotor with four blades, mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, dark in color with possible protective structure around it.
attribute_landing_skids: This helicopter uses a wheeled landing gear system rather than traditional skids; the wheels are black and robust, with visible support struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple angular cockpit windows, including a large front windshield and side panels, slightly tinted with black framing and no visible markings.
